title_en: BHA: The Sneaky Additive in Your Snacks
title_es: BHA: El Aditivo Oculto en Tus Snacks
hook_en: Can you guess what's in this snack?
hook_es: ¿Puedes adivinar qué hay en este snack?
key_message: BHA, a common additive in the US, is banned in the EU for its links to cancer.
_source_regulation_context:
ADDITIVES BANNED IN OTHER COUNTRIES BUT LEGAL IN US:
  • BHA (Butylated Hydroxyanisole): Cereals, snack foods, chewing gum, butter — Banned in: EU (restricted), Japan — Health concern: Reasonably anticipated to be a human carcinogen (NTP)

US OBESITY RATES OVER TIME:
  • 1960: 13.4% (adults), 5.0% (children)
  • 1980: 15.0% (adults), 5.5% (children)
  • 1994: 22.5% (adults), 10.0% (children)
  • 2000: 30.5% (adults), 13.9% (children)
  • 2010: 35.7% (adults), 16.9% (children)
  • 2016: 39.8% (adults), 18.5% (children)
  • 2020: 41.9% (adults), 19.7% (children)
  • 2024: 43.0% (adults), 21.0% (children)

title_en: The Obesity Epidemic: A Timeline of Regulation Failures
title_es: La Epidemia de Obesidad: Una Cronología de Fracasos Regulatorios
hook_en: Watch how obesity rates exploded over decades!
hook_es: ¡Mira cómo explotaron las tasas de obesidad en décadas!
key_message: Lax US food regulations have contributed to the rising obesity rates since 1960.
_source_regulation_context:
